text: Fine. Haze during the day. Force 3 to 4 northeasterly winds, becoming force 5 easterly winds with gusts.
Dry. Fine. Force 5 to 6 easterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 4 to 6 easterly winds with gusts.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Mainly fine. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 4 easterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Mist later. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
